subcodes.first_line: O Thou the dread of Whom hath fallen upon all things, before the splendors of Whose face the countenances of all men are downcast
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا من کل شیء مضطرب من خشیتک و کل الوجوه ساجده عند ظهورات انوار وجهک و کل
subcodes.subjects: @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @call to action, @prayer for forgiveness, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
